title: Moving various subitems at a time
excerpt: Hi, I’d like to request the feature of moving various subitems at a time within the same main item. Right now whenever I try to select more than one to move it, I cannot drag them. I work with 60-100 subitems per project…

posts.author: dpineros (Diana Piñeros)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I’d like to request the feature of moving various subitems at a time within the same main item. Right now whenever I try to select more than one to move it, I cannot drag them. I work with 60-100 subitems per project and it would be ideal for me to move them as a bulk within the main task to organize them rather than just doing it one by one.

Thanks!

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @dpineros, would you mind providing a bit more context about what is means to move them? From where to where?

posts.author: dpineros (Diana Piñeros)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I mean moving them/organizing them within the main task, up or down.
